response:
# Cheaper Mailchimp Alternatives

## **Free/Low-Cost Tiers**

| Service | Free Plan | Best For |
|---------|-----------|----------|
| **Brevo (formerly Sendinblue)** | 300 emails/day unlimited contacts | Growing businesses |
| **Mailerite** | Up to 1,000 subscribers | Simplicity & automation |
| **ConvertKit** | Free tier available | Content creators |
| **Moosend** | Up to 500 contacts free | Automation-focused |
| **ActiveCampaign** | Free limited version | CRM + email combo |

## **Budget-Friendly Paid Options**

- **HubSpot** - $45/month (more features than Mailchimp's paid tier)
- **Klaviyo** - $20/month (e-commerce focused)
- **Constant Contact** - $20/month (user-friendly)
- **GetResponse** - $15/month (good automation)

## **Ultra-Cheap**

- **Substack** - Free (best for newsletters)
- **Beehiiv** - Free (newsletter-specific)
- **EmailOctopus** - Uses your own SendGrid/AWS account (pay-as-you-go)

## **Why Switch?**
- Mailchimp raised prices significantly
- Better automation in lower tiers elsewhere
- More transparent pricing
- Better support for specific use cases (ecommerce, newsletters, etc.)

**What's your main use case?** (newsletters, ecommerce, automation?) I can narrow it down further.
